purpose: Authoritative schema reference for worker progress files at dashboards/{id}/progress/{task_id}.json. Each worker is the sole writer; the file captures status, stage, message, milestones, deviations, logs, files_changed, prompt_size, shared_context, sibling_reads, and annotations. Documents server validation (isValidProgress), file watching with read-delay/retry, dependency dispatch on completion, and complete lifecycle examples from initial write through completion with deviations.
gotchas: task_id must match the filename and dashboard_id must match the directory -- the server hard-rejects mismatches with a write_rejected SSE event
completed_at must be null while status is 'in_progress' (server validation)
Server applies a 30ms read-delay and 80ms retry to handle mid-write reads
files_changed, annotations, template_version, prompt_size, shared_context, sibling_reads are NOT validated by isValidProgress -- workers are responsible for shape
patterns: Sole-writer file with full-file overwrite on every update
Append-only arrays (milestones, deviations, logs) that grow across writes
Stage state machine (reading_context -> planning -> implementing -> testing -> finalizing -> completed/failed)
conventions: Always use Write tool (atomic) -- never echo/cat shell redirects
summary on completion is descriptive; partial completion uses status:'completed' with summary explaining the blocker
annotations key by relative file path; lightweight subset of full PKI annotation schema
